name: Hearty Halibut from Joan Johnson
recipeIngredient: 1 can (4 oz) sliced mushrooms, drained or 1 cup fresh sliced mushrooms
3/4 cup Chopped fresh or canned tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a large baking dish with nonstick spray. Cut the fish into 6 even servings. Arrange onion in the bottom of the baking pan.
2. Place the fish on top of the onion. Combine the remaining ingredients, except margarine and lemon wedges. Spread over the fish. Dot with margarine.
3. Bake for 25 - 30 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork. Serve with lemon wedges.
1 serving = 4 oz cooked fish
Food exchanges per serving: 4 proteins, 1 vegetable, 1 fat
